title: Victory for Ramblers in Promotional League
description: CRICKET NEWS - With a bonus-point victory of...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - With a bonus-point victory of 91 runs against the Plett Pioneers (72 all out) at the weekend of 29 and 30 November, the Ramblers (163/6) have moved into the top four teams on the log in the SWD Promotion League competition.


> All teams in the league have now played four matches.


The top four teams after this weekend are:

First: Pirates United (20 points)

Second: George B (12 points)

Third: Mossel Bay (12 points)

Fourth: Ramblers (12 points)

Summarised scorecards for the weekend:

Promotion League:

Heidelberg United vs Thembalethu

Thembalethu 153 all out (27 overs). Heidelberg United 113 all out (22 overs).

Thembalethu won by 40 runs.

Plett Pioneers vs Ramblers

Ramblers 163/6 (23 overs). Plett Pioneers 72 all out (13.1 overs).

Ramblers won by 91 runs.

George B vs Thembalethu

Thembalethu 45 all out (20.3 overs). George B 46/4 (8.5 overs).

George B won by six wickets.

Mossel Bay vs Ladismith

Match abandoned

Reserve Division 2:

Hartenbos B vs Mossel Bay B

Mossel Bay B 244/7 (40 overs). Hartenbos B 245/7 (36 overs).

Hartenbos B won by three wickets.

Pacaltsdorp United C vs New Dawn Park C

New Dawn Park C 232/8 (30 overs). Pacaltsdorp United C 166 all out (29 overs).

New Dawn Park C won by 66 runs.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
